title: Allow moving items between boards in the Workflow
excerpt:
Within the actions of the Workflow Center, there is no option to move an item to another board, only to move between groups. 
This option exists in automations and we use it extensively in the company to properly distrib…

posts.author: Pcallegari (Patrícia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Within the actions of the Workflow Center, there is no option to move an item to another board, only to move between groups.
This option exists in automations and we use it extensively in the company to properly distribute tasks among departments.
My suggestion is to have this option in the workflow so that we can control all actions within it, without having a separate part in automations.
